use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MACULAR EDEMA ASSOCIATED WITH UVEITIS

indications.text:
XIPERE® (triamcinolone acetonide injectable suspension) 40 mg/mL is indicated for the treatment of
macular edema associated with uveitis.

XIPERE™ (triamcinolone acetonide injectable suspension) 40 mg/mL is indicated for the
treatment of macular edema associated with uveitis.
